name: Chewy Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the vegetable oil, brown sugar substitute, vanilla, egg, and wheat flake cereal until well combined.
2. Gradually add in the all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, baking powder, wheat germ, raisins, and baking soda to the mixture. Stir until just combined.
3. Using a spoon or cookie scoop, drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake for 8-12 minutes at 350°F (175°C) in a preheated oven, or until lightly golden brown.
5. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
